summary: The diff implements REQ-18 by fixing the Daily Dashboard date initialization to use a timezone-aware local date string via the toLocalDateStr(new Date()) helper function. The useState for selectedDate is initialized with a lazy initializer calling todayStr() which calls toLocalDateStr(new Date()), ensuring today's actual local date is used on every component mount. Date navigation and comparisons also use todayStr() consistently. All acceptance criteria appear to be addressed.
